## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss HubSpot automation for lead export, review content strategy progress, and plan next steps for blog content and reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/hx2qCmdMGdTZrP2z9EPGygscypJ5hfhT?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [HubSpot workflow set up to export lead data, including first page seen, lifecycle stage, and lead score](https://fathom.video/share/hx2qCmdMGdTZrP2z9EPGygscypJ5hfhT?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
  - [Content team wrapping up pillar and sub-pillar pieces; discussing next steps (spokes vs. refreshes)](https://fathom.video/share/hx2qCmdMGdTZrP2z9EPGygscypJ5hfhT?tab=summary&timestamp=1776.0)
  - [Exploring TLDR/FAQ-style content additions to improve user experience and SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/hx2qCmdMGdTZrP2z9EPGygscypJ5hfhT?tab=summary&timestamp=1986.0)
  - [Planning to implement structured data for better content organization and search visibility](https://fathom.video/share/hx2qCmdMGdTZrP2z9EPGygscypJ5hfhT?tab=summary&timestamp=2143.0)

## Topics

### HubSpot Automation for Lead Export

  - [Created workflow to export lead data to Google Sheets](https://fathom.video/share/hx2qCmdMGdTZrP2z9EPGygscypJ5hfhT?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)
  - [Included fields: contact ID, company ID, create date, first page seen, lifecycle stage, lead score](https://fathom.video/share/hx2qCmdMGdTZrP2z9EPGygscypJ5hfhT?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
  - [Broadened criteria to capture all blog visits (not just GrowthX blogs) for comprehensive analysis](https://fathom.video/share/hx2qCmdMGdTZrP2z9EPGygscypJ5hfhT?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
  - [Added "date added" field to differentiate between contact creation and conversion dates](https://fathom.video/share/hx2qCmdMGdTZrP2z9EPGygscypJ5hfhT?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)
  - [Jesse to test the workflow and ensure data exports correctly](https://fathom.video/share/hx2qCmdMGdTZrP2z9EPGygscypJ5hfhT?tab=summary&timestamp=1336.0)

### Content Strategy Progress and Next Steps

  - [Pillar and sub-pillar pieces nearly complete (finishing this week or early next)](https://fathom.video/share/hx2qCmdMGdTZrP2z9EPGygscypJ5hfhT?tab=summary&timestamp=1170.0)
  - [Considering options for next content focus:](https://fathom.video/share/hx2qCmdMGdTZrP2z9EPGygscypJ5hfhT?tab=summary&timestamp=1795.0)
    1.  Develop spoke content based on pillar performance
    2.  Refresh existing blog content
    3.  Implement TLDR/FAQ-style additions to improve user experience and SEO

### TLDR/FAQ Content Experiment

  - [Proposed adding summary sections at the top of longer blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/hx2qCmdMGdTZrP2z9EPGygscypJ5hfhT?tab=summary&timestamp=1939.0)
  - [Benefits: Improves user experience, potentially boosts SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/hx2qCmdMGdTZrP2z9EPGygscypJ5hfhT?tab=summary&timestamp=1986.0)
  - [Jakub to design experiment testing TLDR and FAQ formats on select pages](https://fathom.video/share/hx2qCmdMGdTZrP2z9EPGygscypJ5hfhT?tab=summary&timestamp=2032.0)
  - [Team to research examples and best practices for implementation](https://fathom.video/share/hx2qCmdMGdTZrP2z9EPGygscypJ5hfhT?tab=summary&timestamp=2064.0)

### Reporting and Analytics

  - [New HubSpot export will provide more comprehensive data on blog performance](https://fathom.video/share/hx2qCmdMGdTZrP2z9EPGygscypJ5hfhT?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)
  - [Team to analyze early results from published pillar content](https://fathom.video/share/hx2qCmdMGdTZrP2z9EPGygscypJ5hfhT?tab=summary&timestamp=1839.0)
  - [Reporting team to set up filtering for various metrics (e.g., first page seen vs. page visited, GrowthX-specific vs. all blog conversions)](https://fathom.video/share/hx2qCmdMGdTZrP2z9EPGygscypJ5hfhT?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jesse to test HubSpot workflow and confirm data export accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/hx2qCmdMGdTZrP2z9EPGygscypJ5hfhT?tab=summary&timestamp=1336.0)
  - [Jessalynn to consult with reporting team on data filtering and analysis](https://fathom.video/share/hx2qCmdMGdTZrP2z9EPGygscypJ5hfhT?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)
  - [Jakub to review pillar content performance and share insights](https://fathom.video/share/hx2qCmdMGdTZrP2z9EPGygscypJ5hfhT?tab=summary&timestamp=2006.0)
  - [Team to research TLDR/FAQ examples and structured data implementation](https://fathom.video/share/hx2qCmdMGdTZrP2z9EPGygscypJ5hfhT?tab=summary&timestamp=2143.0)
  - [Jakub to design TLDR/FAQ experiment for select blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/hx2qCmdMGdTZrP2z9EPGygscypJ5hfhT?tab=summary&timestamp=2032.0)
  - [Jesse to work with dev team on implementing structured data and comparison chart module in CMS](https://fathom.video/share/hx2qCmdMGdTZrP2z9EPGygscypJ5hfhT?tab=summary&timestamp=2224.0)
  - [Team to prepare recommendations for next content focus (spokes vs. refreshes) based on early pillar content performance](https://fathom.video/share/hx2qCmdMGdTZrP2z9EPGygscypJ5hfhT?tab=summary&timestamp=1839.0)
